database.sql: SELECT IndexId, ConfigType, ConfigVersion, Address, Port, Ports, Id, AlterId, Security, Network, Remarks, HeaderType, RequestHost, Path, StreamSecurity, AllowInsecure, Subid, IsSub, Flow, Sni, Alpn, CoreType, PreSocksPort, Fingerprint, DisplayLog, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, Mldsa65Verify, Extra, MuxEnabled, Cert FROM ProfileItem WHERE Subid NOT IN ('4793493882399264076','5126987642659995691') AND ConfigType IN ('1', '3', '5', '6');
database.sql_by_subid: SELECT IndexId, ConfigType, ConfigVersion, Address, Port, Ports, Id, AlterId, Security, Network, Remarks, HeaderType, RequestHost, Path, StreamSecurity, AllowInsecure, Subid, IsSub, Flow, Sni, Alpn, CoreType, PreSocksPort, Fingerprint, DisplayLog, PublicKey, ShortId, SpiderX, Mldsa65Verify, Extra, MuxEnabled, Cert FROM ProfileItem WHERE Subid = '{subid}';
